A personal financial OS that acts as a reasoning + memory layer over all your financial data. It's not a chatbot — the PRD explicitly calls it a "financial operating system."

**ArthaOS** is a Privacy-First Personal Financial Intelligence Operating System.

## What it is

Not a chatbot or dashboard — a **reasoning + memory layer** over your personal financial data. It combines structured financial data, RAG (retrieval-augmented generation), and constrained LLM reasoning to produce explainable financial insights.
